column1: # Beckhoff EL7201-9014 — 1-channel compact servo drive terminal, resolver.
# Relation to the rest of the EL72xx family:
#   EL7201  2.8 A / 50 V — resolver feedback (this file)
#   EL7211  4.5 A / 50 V — OCT / Hiperface DSL absolute feedback
#   EL7221  8.0 A / 50 V — OCT / Hiperface DSL absolute feedback
# All three share the DS402 profile, the same SM layout, the same
# `AssignActivate = 0x0700` DC programming, and the same CSP PDO pair
# (0x1600 / 0x1A00) once `0x8012:08 = 1` selects the DS402 profile. The
# only runtime differences are the current rating and the feedback source
# — the EL7201 must load resolver-specific scaling from 0x8060 (FB
# Resolver settings) instead of pulling from OCT's electronic nameplate.
# The -9014 suffix is the CE-approved variant with STO input; all three
# Resolver-specific (EL7201 only) — poles + scaling stored in 0x8060.
